name: mind-elixir
when_to_use: 需要用户直接编辑、拖排并导出 JSON 思维导图时用它而非手写 SVG/Mermaid,因为原生在节点编辑、分支重排、自动布局和可逆历史上失败。非做只读的小型静态树图,静态树继续用 Mermaid。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能输出静态 Mermaid mindmap;默认做不到画布内节点编辑、分支拖排、左右布局、缩放漫游与结构 JSON 回读,手写后也难保持树和画面同步。

data_in.note: data.map 直接采用 MindElixirData:根必须位于 nodeData,不是裸 children 数组。id 与 topic 是每个节点的必需字段;parent 是运行时字段,输入中不要提供。

nodeData.expanded?: boolean —— 分支是否展开,默认 true
nodeData.direction?: 0 | 1 —— 左/右分支,默认由根布局分配

schema.editable?: boolean —— 是否可编辑,默认 true

spec.note: 导图 SVG/HTML 混合布局必须在初始化前拿到非零容器尺寸;默认 height 480px,AI 可覆盖为其他明确像素值,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

en.when_to_use: Use it when users need to edit, drag-reorder, and export a mind map as JSON instead of hand-writing SVG/Mermaid, which tends to fail at node editing, branch reordering, automatic layout, and reversible history. For a small read-only static tree, continue to use Mermaid.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to a static Mermaid mindmap and cannot provide in-canvas node editing, branch dragging, left/right layout, zoom/pan, and reading the structure back as JSON while keeping tree data synchronized with the view.

data_in.note: data.map uses MindElixirData directly: the root must be under nodeData, not a bare children array. id and topic are required on every node. parent is a runtime field and should not be supplied in input.

nodeData.id: string -- unique across the entire map
nodeData.children?: Node[] -- recursively the same structure; default []
nodeData.expanded?: boolean -- whether the branch is expanded; default true
nodeData.direction?: 0 | 1 -- left/right branch; assigned by the root layout by default

schema.editable?: boolean -- whether editing is enabled; default true

spec.note: The mixed SVG/HTML layout must receive nonzero container dimensions before initialization. Default height is 480px; AI may use another explicit pixel value, but rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights.

example._why: MindElixir 要求 nodeData 包裹、稳定 id 与递归 NodeObj,属于编辑器高歧义输入;minimal 用原生 MindElixirData 消歧。

uplink._note: 本条不预置统一事件出口;消费 AI 需要回传时自行读取 mind.getData()。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行把 mind.getData() 的 JSON 编入 sendPrompt 文案。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行把 mind.getData() 交给 sendFollowUpMessage。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;提供把 mind.getData() 下载为 JSON 的兜底。

carriers.widget: conditional:必须把 MindElixir.css 与显式高度容器放进 shadowRoot;构造器接收 HTMLElement,核心 SVG/DOM 留在该容器

isolation.evidence: mind-elixir +esm greps: `document.head` count 0 (CSS is a separate file the boot links into shadow); no `document.body` reference; all 15 `addEventListener` calls bind to the container or local element nodes — confirmed `e.container.addEventListener("keydown",…)`, and NO `(document|window).addEventListener` match, so keypress/contextmenu/wheel are container-scoped. Node DOM, toolbar and context menu are built under `e.container`. Result: no global style/DOM/event side effects — fully shadow-safe once the boot places CSS + the sized container in shadowRoot (entry labels this 'conditional' but the evidence supports 'yes').
